title: post api auth signup valid user registration
description: Test the POST /api/auth/signup endpoint with valid email, strong password, and optional name to ensure successful user registration returns 201 with created user data including id, email, and name.

title: post api auth signup invalid input validation errors
description: Test the POST /api/auth/signup endpoint with missing or invalid email and password fields to verify it returns 400 with appropriate field validation error messages.

title: post api auth signup duplicate email conflict
description: Test the POST /api/auth/signup endpoint with an email already registered in the system to confirm it returns 409 with an error indicating the email is already in use.

title: post api auth signup server error handling
description: Test the POST /api/auth/signup endpoint simulating a server or database failure to ensure it returns 500 with a generic server error message.
